children.name: Cannorhiza
children.description: Cannorhiza — a genus of archirhizid jellyfish in the family Archirhizidae.

children.name: Cannorhiza connexa
children.description: Cannorhiza connexa — a species in the genus Cannorhiza, family Archirhizidae. Also known as archirhizid jellyfish.
